name: Dead Sea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 celery heart with whitish leafy stalks
1 can (10.5 oz) chicken and rice soup
recipeInstructions:
1. With an adult's help, chop the celery heart into small pieces.
2. Using clean hands, pull apart the surrounding whitish leafy stalks; these will be your seaweed. Set aside.
3. Drain the jar of artichoke hearts and cut into pieces about the size of a penny.
4. Prepare the soup according to the package directions. Add the celery and artichokes and heat until the soup comes to a boil.
5. Turn off the heat and carefully add two or three drops each of blue and green food coloring until the soup reaches an appropriately murky seawater color.
6. Carefully ladle the hot soup into individual bowls.
7. Sprinkle a quarter cup of fish-shaped crackers on top of each bowl.
8. Encourage some of the floating celery seaweed to hang over the edge of the bowls. The artichoke pieces and rice will sink, just like in the sea.
